Getting Started

General Guide

FAQ

Features

Dashboard

Practice Simulation

Evaluation & Feedback

History Tracking

Knowledge Assistant

On this page

Dashboard ​

Keep track of your practice progress and learning outcomes at a glance

Page Overview ​

The Dashboard is the home page after logging in, providing an overview of your personal learning progress and shortcuts. The page is divided into two areas: Statistics Cards and Recent Practice History.

Statistics Cards ​

Start Conversation ​

  • Click to enter the practice page and start a new session

Total Practices ​

  • Total number of practice sessions you have completed
  • Unit: Times

Total Conversation Time ​

  • Cumulative duration of all your practice sessions
  • Unit: Hours

Consecutive Practice Days ​

  • Number of consecutive days you have practiced
  • Unit: Days (Resets if a day is missed)

Quick Filters ​

OptionDescription
Clock Icon (Default)Displays the 5 most recent practice records
TodayFilters practice records for today
AllJumps to the "History Tracking" page

Recent Practice History ​

FieldDescription
DateDate the practice was conducted
AgeAge of the customer persona
GenderGender of the customer persona
NameName of the customer persona
OccupationOccupation of the customer persona
IncomeIncome level of the customer persona
StageFinal sales stage reached
DurationDuration of the conversation (minutes)

Action Buttons ​

ButtonDescription
View ReviewGo to the evaluation report page
RetryStart a new session using the same persona
ContinueResume an unfinished conversation

Date Grouping ​

Records are grouped by date if there are multiple sessions on the same day.

Next Steps ​

  • Start Practice Simulation
  • Understand the Evaluation & Feedback
  • View the complete History Tracking
